name: Sae Me Duk (Korean Steamed Buckwheat Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a firm dough with the flour, salt and as much water as necessary to create a manageable dough.
2. Roll out the dough into a 1/4-inch-thick rectangle. Cut it into six squares and place them on an oiled perforated tray in a Chinese style steamer. Cook over moderate heat for 10 minutes.
3. Serve warm on special days (traditionally served at ceremonials or on birthdays). Makes 6 cakes.
